note: Frozen live state; superseded items deliberately absent. Authored before the harness.

active_claims.what: JWT in localStorage was rejected because of XSS exposure; sessions use httpOnly cookies

active_constraints.what: the system must be SOC2 compliant by Q4

decisions.what: store third-party tokens in the secrets vault; application-database storage was dropped

open_conflicts.what: token rotation period: platform wants 30 days vs integrations wants 90 days

open_questions.what: whether to add hardware-key MFA for admins
